heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 98–242, title I, § 110(a)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984
label: 7831 to 7835 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 98–242, title I, § 110(a)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984
notes: Section 7831, , , , set out Congressional findings and declaration of policy in establishing a program for water research and development for saline and other impaired waters.Pub. L. 95–467, title II, § 20092 Stat. 1310Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7832, , , , set out functions of the Secretary.Pub. L. 95–467, title II, § 20192 Stat. 1310Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7833, , , , set out additional functions of the Secretary with regard to demonstrations and prototype plants, utilization of Federal expertise, and financial assistance from State or public agencies.Pub. L. 95–467, title II, § 20292 Stat. 1310Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7834, , , , authorized the Secretary to issue rules and regulations to carry out this subchapter.Pub. L. 95–467, title II, § 20392 Stat. 1311Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7835, , , , defined “saline and other impaired water”, “United States”, “pilot plant”, “demonstration”, and “prototype”.Pub. L. 95–467, title II, § 20492 Stat. 1311Oct. 17, 1978
For similar provisions, see section 10301 et seq. of this title.
